metadata.title: FluidAlp – Ventilation & Fire Safety Engineering
metadata.description: Expert ventilation, smoke extraction and fire safety engineering for tunnels, metros and confined spaces. Thônes, French Alps.

whoWeAre.subtitle: FluidAlp
whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.text: Founded in 2005 by Eric Casalé, FluidAravis — now FluidAlp — specialises in research & development, engineering studies and consulting in ventilation and fire safety for confined spaces.

skills.subtitle: FluidAlp
skills.title: Expertise
skills.text: Versatility combined with competence across ventilation, fire safety, pollution and thermal engineering — that is what makes FluidAlp a truly unique firm.

references.subtitle: FluidAlp
references.title: References
references.text: Over the years FluidAlp has contributed to numerous large-scale projects, bringing its full expertise to bear. Visit our References pages for more details.

partners.subtitle: FluidAlp
partners.title: Our partners
partners.text: For many years FluidAlp has worked with loyal partners and clients who are convinced by our technical skills and experience.

companyIntro: FluidAlp is an independent engineering consultancy specialising in ventilation and fire safety for all confined spaces such as tunnels, metros, hydroelectric plants and underground roads. In close collaboration with Aix-Marseille University, FluidAlp offers innovative technical solutions that combine efficiency with reduced investment and operating costs.

about.title: About FluidAlp
about.subtitle: An independent engineering consultancy dedicated to safety and ventilation
founderCredentials: Professor at Aix-Marseille University (MSc Fire Safety Engineering)
Member of the CNRS Fire Research Group since 2007

simulation.title: Numerical Simulation
simulation.description: Computational fluid dynamics codes, 3D modelling and fire simulation

measurements.title: Measurements
measurements.description: Field measurement equipment for validation and monitoring

ventilationPage.title: Ventilation
ventilationPage.subtitle: Design and engineering of ventilation systems for underground structures
ventilationPage.intro: FluidAlp designs and engineers ventilation systems for all types of underground structures: road and rail tunnels, metros, car parks and hydroelectric power plants.
servicesList: Ventilation studies at preliminary, detailed and execution design stages
Sizing of longitudinal and transverse ventilation systems
ventilationPage.methodologyText: Our methodology is based on deep expertise in fluid mechanics, combined with state-of-the-art numerical simulation tools. Each study is conducted rigorously in accordance with current standards and regulations.

fireSafetyPage.title: Fire Safety
fireSafetyPage.subtitle: Smoke extraction studies and fire simulations for underground structures
fireSafetyPage.intro: FluidAlp carries out comprehensive fire safety studies, including smoke extraction, fire simulation and evacuation analysis in confined spaces.
servicesList: Mechanical and natural smoke extraction studies
applicationsList: Metro stations and underground railway stations
fireSafetyPage.methodologyText: Our studies rely on advanced CFD simulations to model fire development, smoke propagation and evacuation conditions. This scientific approach guarantees reliable and optimised results.

pollutionThermalPage.title: Pollution & Thermal
pollutionThermalPage.subtitle: Pollutant dispersion studies and thermal analysis in confined environments
pollutionThermalPage.intro: FluidAlp carries out air quality and thermal environment studies for confined spaces, tunnel portals and industrial environments.
servicesList: Pollutant dispersion studies at tunnel portals
pollutionThermalPage.methodologyText: Our studies combine in-situ measurements and 3D numerical simulations to characterise pollutant dispersion and thermal fields. This dual approach validates our models and delivers optimised solutions.

simulationPage.title: Numerical Simulation
simulationPage.subtitle: CFD modelling and fire simulation for detailed flow analysis
simulationPage.intro: FluidAlp uses state-of-the-art computational fluid dynamics codes to simulate airflows, smoke propagation and heat transfer in underground structures.

softwareList.name: FDS (Fire Dynamics Simulator)
softwareList.description: Fire simulation code developed by NIST, the world reference for modelling fire dynamics and smoke propagation.

softwareList.name: OpenFOAM
softwareList.description: Open-source CFD suite for complex flow simulation, turbulence and heat transfer.

softwareList.name: Proprietary codes
softwareList.description: In-house tools for rapid ventilation system sizing and pressure drop calculations.

capabilitiesList: 3D airflow modelling in steady-state and transient regimes

measurementsPage.title: Measurements
measurementsPage.subtitle: Field measurement campaigns for validation and monitoring
measurementsPage.intro: FluidAlp conducts on-site measurement campaigns to validate theoretical studies, verify installation performance and ensure regulatory compliance.

equipmentList.name: Anemometers
equipmentList.description: Air velocity and flow rate measurement in ducts and underground structures.

equipmentList.name: Gas analysers
equipmentList.description: Detection and quantification of pollutant concentrations (CO, NO2, particles).

equipmentList.name: Temperature sensors
equipmentList.description: Thermal mapping and environment monitoring in confined spaces.

equipmentList.name: Smoke generators
equipmentList.description: Airflow visualisation and smoke extraction system verification.

projects.title: Our projects
projects.subtitle: Major projects in France and internationally

gfc-stade-velodrome.title: GFC Construction – Stade Vélodrome
gfc-stade-velodrome.description: Stade Vélodrome in Marseille: complementary smoke extraction studies for the interior service routes.

bouygues-pitie-salpetriere.title: Bouygues – Pitié Salpêtrière
bouygues-pitie-salpetriere.description: BEH Endocrinology Unit at Pitié Salpêtrière: aeraulic study and pollutant dispersion measurement.

artelia-musee-marseille.title: Artelia – Marseille History Museum
artelia-musee-marseille.description: Smoke extraction study for the Marseille History Museum.

tunnel-prado-carenage-ventilation.title: Prado-Carénage Tunnel – Ventilation
tunnel-prado-carenage-ventilation.description: Monitoring the design and development of mechanical ventilation management automation for smoke extraction at the Prado Carénage structure.

tunnel-prado-carenage-incendie.title: Prado-Carénage Tunnel – Fire
tunnel-prado-carenage-incendie.description: Numerical fire simulations as part of specific hazard studies.

tunnels-grand-lyon.title: Greater Lyon Tunnels
tunnels-grand-lyon.description: Owner's representative assistance for operations related to Greater Lyon road tunnels: major renovation of the Croix Rousse Tunnel, ventilation studies, calculations and tests, smoke extraction assessments for the Caluire tunnel, smoke extraction tests in the Croix Rousse and Fourvière tunnels.

rtm-metro-marseille.title: RTM – Marseille Metro
rtm-metro-marseille.description: Contract for ventilation scenario validation testing on lines 1 and 2 of the Marseille metro. Ventilation tests to qualify and validate new scenario sequences derived from one-dimensional and three-dimensional simulation studies.

yvroud-ratp.title: Yvroud – RATP
yvroud-ratp.description: RATP: aeraulic studies of a set of ventilation shafts in the Paris metro.

xelis-ligne-12.title: Xelis – Line 12 Extension
xelis-ligne-12.description: Paris metro: smoke extraction assessment for the Line 12 extension, phase 2.

artelia-metro-marseille.title: Artelia – Marseille Metro
artelia-metro-marseille.description: Extension of Marseille metro line 2: numerical smoke extraction modelling for an interchange hub.

egis-wukun-expressway.title: Egis International – Wukun Expressway (China)
egis-wukun-expressway.description: The Wukun Expressway project in China: assessment of tunnel safety installations.

egis-rail-prado-sud.title: Egis Rail – Prado Sud Tunnel
egis-rail-prado-sud.description: Prado-Sud Tunnel: review of execution study documents and files produced by the consortium in the field of mechanical ventilation equipment.

colas-rail-tunnels-ferroviaires.title: Colas Rail – Railway Tunnels
colas-rail-tunnels-ferroviaires.description: Construction site ventilation study for several railway tunnels: Janots, Nerthe, Mulatière, Cimiez and Rolleboise tunnels.

sempariseine-halles.title: SemPariSeine – Les Halles Underground Road, Paris
sempariseine-halles.description: Aeraulic simulations of the mechanical ventilation and smoke extraction system for the Les Halles underground road. 1D modelling of the tunnel and its transverse ventilation/smoke extraction system during the construction phase. Modelling and study of smoke extraction scenarios during construction, including minimum operating conditions.

efectis-bure-montaigre.title: Efectis Outlabs – Bure & Montaigre Tunnels (Switzerland)
efectis-bure-montaigre.description: Assistance with aeraulic testing in the Bure and Bois de Montaigre tunnels.

edf-centrale-hydroelectrique.title: EDF – Hydroelectric Plants
edf-centrale-hydroelectrique.description: Ventilation and smoke extraction study for the Gavet, La Coche and Lac Noir hydroelectric power plants.

stucky-veytaux.title: Stucky – Veytaux Power Plant (Switzerland)
stucky-veytaux.description: Design and sizing of the mechanical ventilation and smoke extraction system for the new Veytaux 2 power plant, including impact on the operation of Veytaux 1.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: FluidAlp is committed to protecting the privacy of its website visitors.
privacy.dataCollectionText: We only collect personal data that you voluntarily submit through the contact form: name, email, phone, company and message.
privacy.dataUseText: Your data is used exclusively to respond to your contact request. It is neither sold nor shared with third parties.
privacy.dataRetentionText: Your data is retained for a maximum of 3 years from your last contact.
privacy.rightsText: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at fluidalp@fluidalp.fr.
privacy.cookiesText: This website does not use any tracking or advertising cookies. Only essential technical cookies required for the website to function are used.

footer.description: Independent engineering consultancy specialised in ventilation and fire safety for confined spaces.
